name: graffiticode-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Graffiticode - multi-language DSL platform

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run typecheck:widget && tsx --test tests/*.test.ts
scripts.gcp:build: gcloud builds submit --project graffiticode-app --config cloudbuild.yaml --substitutions=COMMIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'latest')
scripts.gcp:deploy: gcloud run deploy mcp-service --project graffiticode-app --source . --port 3001 --region us-central1 --platform managed --allow-unauthenticated
scripts.gcp:logs: gcloud run services logs read mcp-service --project graffiticode-app --region us-central1

author: Artcompiler
